name: live freshness gate without --skip-fresh exit code is non-zero on stale sources
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch && printf '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch/owasp-asvs.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --operation cite --source owasp-asvs --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && echo nonzero 1>&2
